name: Fallen Empires
collationMethod: striped, 11x11 sheets; common sheet (C4/C3/C1) + uncommon sheet (U3/U2/U1)

draft.notes: 8-card booster: 6 from the common sheet, 2 from the uncommon sheet. No rare slot. Cards back-facing; sometimes commons first, sometimes uncommons first. Pre-foil era.

statedRates: no separate rares; common sheet has C4/C3/C1 cards (20 C3, 15 C4, 1 C1), uncommon sheet has U3/U2/U1 cards (25 U3, 5 U2, 36 U1)
sourceNotes: Small set, 102 cards. Two print sheets only (common + uncommon); no distinct rare rarity. Many cards have multiple art variations per print. Page classes by print frequency so common/uncommon totals left null. Printed Belgium. 60 packs per box.
